channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Launches First Deep Geothermal Power Plant in Cornwall
item.description: The UK is set to inaugurate its first deep geothermal power plant in Cornwall, providing renewable electricity to around 10,000 homes. Developed by Geothermal Engineering Ltd (GEL) over nearly two dec...

item.title: Violence Erupts in Puerto Vallarta After Reported Killing of Cartel Leader
item.description: Violence broke out in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, following the reported killing of cartel leader Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, known as “El Mencho,” by Mexican military forces. In apparent retaliation, su...

item.title: Oxford Street to be pedestrianised following official approval
item.description: The Mayor of London, Sir Sadiq Khan, has granted final approval for the pedestrianisation of Oxford Street, instructing Transport for London (TfL) to remove traffic from the stretch between Great Port...

item.title: Impact of 2026 F1 Rules on Driver Skill and Performance
item.description: The introduction of Formula 1's 2026 regulations has prompted debate on whether driver skill remains a decisive factor in racing performance. Top drivers like Max Verstappen, Lewis Hamilton, Fernando ...

item.title: Trump Criticizes Democratic Lawmakers and Robert De Niro Following State of the Union Address
item.description: President Donald Trump sharply criticized Democratic Representatives Ilhan Omar of Minnesota and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan, as well as actor Robert De Niro, following a tense State of the Union addres...

item.title: Hannah Spencer becomes Green Party MP after Gorton and Denton by-election win
item.description: Hannah Spencer, a 34-year-old plumber from Greater Manchester, has become the Green Party's first ever Westminster by-election winner, securing the Gorton and Denton seat. Spencer began her working li...

item.title: Green Party by-election victory in Gorton and Denton raises strategic questions for Labour
item.description: The Green Party has secured a historic victory in the Gorton and Denton by-election, marking the first time it has won a Westminster by-election. The result represents a significant political moment a...

item.title: Recipe for a Versatile Buttery Cookie Dough
item.description: The article was intended to provide readers with a straightforward recipe for a versatile, buttery cookie dough suitable for a variety of baking purposes. Unfortunately, access to the content has been...

item.title: Industry Season Four Expands Ambitiously but Struggles to Maintain Its Core Appeal
item.description: The fourth season of the HBO/BBC drama Industry has reached ambitious heights, yet this expansion has come with notable missteps. Once a tightly focused series on junior employees navigating the high-...

item.title: Fresh forensic analysis challenges key silencer evidence in Jeremy Bamber conviction
item.description: A new forensic review of crime scene photographs has raised further questions about the safety of Jeremy Bamber’s 1986 conviction for the murders of five members of his family at White House Farm in E...

item.title: Higher Blood Tyrosine Levels Associated With Slightly Shorter Lifespan in Men, Large Study Finds
item.description: A large study published in the journal Aging examined whether two common amino acids, phenylalanine and tyrosine, are linked to lifespan. Researchers from the University of Hong Kong and the Universit...

item.title: Pakistan Launches Airstrikes on Afghan Territories Amid Rising Tensions with Taliban
item.description: Pakistan has announced an escalation of military operations against Afghanistan's Taliban-led government, labelling it an 'open war'. The announcement follows cross-border attacks allegedly carried ou...

item.title: Spotify Introduces Weekly Audiobook Charts for U.S. and U.K. Users
item.description: Spotify has announced the launch of Audiobook Charts for users in the U.S. and U.K., expanding its focus beyond music and podcasts. Similar to its existing charts for other content, the Audiobook Char...

item.title: Labour suffers significant loss in Gorton and Denton by-election, Harman urges stability
item.description: Labour has experienced a significant setback in the Gorton and Denton by-election, with the Green Party candidate, Hannah Spencer, securing victory with 14,980 votes and a majority of 4,402. This mark...

item.title: Hillary Clinton Testifies on Epstein, Denies Knowledge, Criticizes Committee's Questions
item.description: Former US Secretary of State Hillary Clinton appeared before the US House Oversight Committee in New York to answer questions related to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein. During the deposition, Cli...

item.title: Rush Reunites for R50 Tour Driven by Lifelong Friendship
item.description: After the death of drummer Neil Peart in 2020, many assumed Canadian progressive rock icons Rush would never reunite. However, Geddy Lee and Alex Lifeson, friends since junior high, have decided to re...

item.title: Rapid Retreat of Hektoria Glacier in Antarctica Highlights Risks of Sudden Ice Loss
item.description: In a remarkable event, Hektoria Glacier on Antarctica's Eastern Peninsula retreated approximately eight kilometers in just two months, with nearly half of the glacier collapsing during this period. Le...

item.title: Potential Risks and Contingency Plans for the International Space Station
item.description: The International Space Station (ISS) constantly faces the threat of space debris, which includes spent rocket parts, broken satellites, and micrometeoroids traveling at extremely high speeds. While m...

item.title: Teenager Detained for Stabbing 14-Year-Old Boy in Manchester
item.description: A 14-year-old boy has been detained for at least 11 years and 10 months after fatally stabbing 14-year-old Ibrahima Seck in Manchester on June 8. Ibrahima was on his way to play football with friends ...

item.title: Greens secure historic Gorton and Denton by-election win, Labour falls to third place
item.description: In a historic result, the Green Party has won its first ever by-election in the UK, capturing the Gorton and Denton seat in Greater Manchester. Hannah Spencer, a 34-year-old plumber and trainee plaste...
